name: Neocron RenoDX Engine — HLSL pixel-shader injection
author: Neocron Community
description: ReShade Add-on Edition .addon32 that hooks D3D9 create_pipeline to substitute Neocron's world.ps (CRC 0x2ccf5eb7) with a runtime-compiled HLSL replacement. Per-texture normal-mapped Phong: each game world texture is fingerprinted via D3D9 LockRect on first use, looked up against `neocron_texture_index.txt` (deployed by the nc2-hd-textures addon), and the matching `_n.png` from the AI normal corpus is bound at sampler 5. Falls back to a generic brick normal when no per-texture match is found.
